structure.name: string, unique, snake_case
structure.label: string
structure.house_numbers_json: array, documentary only; runtime source of truth is astral_houses.house_modality_id

data.name: angular
data.label: Angular
data.description: Angular houses are houses 1, 4, 7 and 10. They are tied to the Ascendant, IC, Descendant and MC, and are considered the strongest, most visible and most active houses.
data.runtime_usage: Use as a strong weighting factor for planet_in_house, accidental dignity, manifestation power, visibility score, planetary strength and interpretation priority.

data.name: succedent
data.label: Succedent
data.description: Succedent houses are houses 2, 5, 8 and 11. They follow angular houses and stabilize, maintain, develop or consolidate what angular houses initiate.
data.runtime_usage: Use as a medium weighting factor for continuity, consolidation, resource development and stable expression in planet-in-house rules.

data.name: cadent
data.label: Cadent
data.description: Cadent houses are houses 3, 6, 9 and 12. They precede angular houses and describe more preparatory, adaptive, transitional, mental or less visible zones.
data.runtime_usage: Use as a lower external manifestation weighting factor, not as a negative judgement. Cadent emphasis can still be important for mental, adaptive or preparatory expression.
